professionalSpecs: Expert in Game Architecture & Design Patterns

profile.name: Victor Ciorici
profile.summary: Senior Unity Developer with 12+ years of experience in game development using the Unity engine and C#. Experienced in the full development lifecycle, from concept and architecture to implementation, optimization, and release. Strong background in gameplay systems, UI development, multiplayer architecture, and performance optimization across PC, mobile, and VR platforms.

skills.name: Unity 3D / 2D
skills.desc: Expert knowledge of Core, HDRP, and URP pipelines.

skills.name: C# Architecture
skills.desc: Advanced software architecture and scalable design patterns.

skills.name: Multiplayer Systems
skills.desc: Networked gameplay using Photon Fusion and Client/Server architecture.

skills.name: VR / AR / XR
skills.desc: Immersive experiences for Oculus Quest/Rift, GearVR, and AR platforms.

skills.name: Shader Development
skills.desc: Custom HLSL shaders and rendering pipeline optimization.

skills.name: Custom Editors
skills.desc: Developing internal tools and level editors to support workflows.

skills.name: Procedural Systems
skills.desc: Real-time generation of meshes, textures, levels, and items.

skills.name: SDK Integration
skills.desc: Analytics, Facebook SDK, IAP, and platform services.

skills.name: PC / Steam
skills.desc: Full lifecycle development for desktop releases.

skills.name: Mobile Optimization
skills.desc: Profiling and refactoring for high-traffic mobile titles.

skills.name: WebGL / HTML5
skills.desc: Optimized deployments for browser-based interactive apps.

careerTimeline.description: Developing UI systems and gameplay features for PC games using Unity.
achievements: Implemented modular UI components ensuring a responsive and polished player experience.
Developed core gameplay mechanics and tools for rapid feature iteration.
Collaborated with artists and designers to maintain visual consistency across UI assets.
Maintained high code quality through rigorous standards and code reviews.

careerTimeline.description: Developed and maintained gameplay systems for mobile games using Unity and C#.
achievements: Implemented core gameplay mechanics, UI systems, and gameplay features.
Optimized game performance through profiling and refactoring for various mobile devices.
Integrated third-party SDKs including analytics and platform services.
Investigated and resolved complex bugs while maintaining stable builds.

careerTimeline.description: Core gameplay engineering for high-traffic mobile titles.
achievements: Improved game performance through profiling and optimization of system bottlenecks.
Collaborated with artists and animators to integrate and optimize visual assets.
Contributed to live game updates, feature development, and bug fixes.
Reduced development time by improving code quality and refactoring systems.

careerTimeline.description: Leading development of PC games for Steam using Unity.
achievements: Established coding standards to maintain consistent code quality.
Mentored junior developers and supported team collaboration.
Diagnosed and resolved complex technical issues while maintaining performance.
Reported development progress and technical updates to stakeholders.

careerTimeline.description: Developing AR/VR applications and multiplayer prototypes.
achievements: Participated in development of a MOBA prototype until MVP stage.
Implemented multiplayer systems using Photon Fusion.
Designed scalable architecture for complex gameplay systems.
Implemented performance-critical systems for real-time applications.

careerTimeline.description: Specialized in XR development and cross-platform optimization.
achievements: Implemented VR and AR solutions for platforms including GearVR and Oculus Rift.
Optimized performance for VR and WebGL deployments.
Developed internal tools and technical tools to support development workflows.

careerTimeline.description: Full-stack game development from concept to launch on PC and Mobile.
achievements: Developed multiple Unity games from concept to deployment.
Built custom level editors and development tools.
Implemented systems for achievements, leaderboards, and encrypted save data.

careerTimeline.description: Assisting in the development of core systems and UI frameworks.
achievements: Contributed to development of a large enterprise project using Silverlight.
Worked with large MySQL databases to improve performance and reliability.
Implemented a search engine solution that significantly reduced database query time.
Developed bug fixes and system improvements for future releases.

manifesto.headline: Engineering Manifesto
manifesto.intro: A collection of core technical principles that guide every line of code I write. These are the architectural foundation of high-performance interactive systems.

tenets.title: Performance by Default
tenets.content: Optimization isn't a post-production step; it's a foundational requirement. High frame rates and low latency are the prerequisites for immersion.

tenets.title: Architecture as Art
tenets.content: Code should be as elegant as the visuals it renders. We build modular, scalable systems that survive the entropy of long-term development.

tenets.title: The DOTS Revolution
tenets.content: Embracing Data-Oriented Design to push hardware to its limits. Moving away from object-oriented bottlenecks to unlock massive scale.

tenets.title: Iterate or Die
tenets.content: Rapid prototyping combined with rigorous testing. We build, break, and refine until the system is bulletproof.

projects.title: MOBA Strike
challenges: Implementing deterministic lockstep-style networking in a fast-paced MOBA environment.
Designing scalable architecture for complex gameplay systems and hero abilities.
Optimizing performance-critical systems for real-time competitive play.

projects.title: Void Runner XR
challenges: Maintaining high-fidelity PBR rendering while hitting 90FPS on mobile XR hardware.
Developing cross-platform XR solutions for GearVR, Oculus Rift, and Quest.
Optimizing WebGL and VR deployments for minimal latency and maximum immersion.

projects.title: Nexus Workflow Tools
challenges: Architecting custom level editors and development tools to streamline designer workflows.
Implementing real-time procedural generation for meshes, textures, and environments.
Integrating complex third-party SDKs (Facebook, Analytics, IAP) into a unified pipeline.
